responsibility: Represent a single structured, reusable piece of engineering knowledge extracted from run artifacts. A knowledge record normalizes knowledge out of its source document into a queryable, provenance-linked form.

write_policy.notes: A knowledge record is superseded when its source artifact is superseded or when the knowledge is explicitly invalidated. Superseded records are retained for provenance.

knowledge_id.description: Stable unique identifier. Recommended format: KR-<project_short>-<monotonic_counter>.

version.description: Version string, e.g. 'v1'. Increment when the record is superseded.

supersedes_id.description: knowledge_id of the prior version of this record. Null for first versions.

knowledge_type.description: Type of knowledge. Determines expected content structure.

title.description: Short, human-readable title. Must be unique enough to distinguish within a project.

content.description: Explicit, self-contained description of the knowledge. Must not rely on reader context not captured in provenance.

applies_to.description: Run IDs, workflow states, or artifact types where this knowledge applies.

provenance.description: Source artifacts from which this knowledge was extracted.

items.section_ref: string or null (section heading or field path)

status.description: active = currently valid; superseded = replaced by newer version; deprecated = no longer applicable.

tags.description: Optional facets for deterministic filtering. Must be explicit strings, not inferred categories.

related_knowledge_ids.description: knowledge_ids of related records in the same index.

falsification_condition.description: For knowledge_type=improvement_hypothesis: explicit condition under which this hypothesis would be falsified.

_changelog.change: Initial version. Defines single structured knowledge record schema with provenance, validity_scope, and status fields.
